sections.paragraph:
Original: עץ

Transliteration: ‛êts

Phonetic: ates

BDB Definition:

  1. tree, wood, timber, stock, plank, stalk, stick, gallows
    1. tree, trees
    2. wood, pieces of wood, gallows, firewood, cedar-wood, woody flax

Origin: from H6095

TWOT entry: 1670a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
